/* c8 ignore start */ // duplicated from transform-file so we do not have to import anything here type TransformFile = { (filename: string, callback: (error: Error, file: null) => void): void; ( filename: string, opts: any, callback: (error: Error, file: null) => void, ): void; }; export const transformFile: TransformFile = function transformFile( filename, opts, callback?: (error: Error, file: null) => void, ) { if (typeof opts === "function") { callback = opts; } callback(new Error("Transforming files is not supported in browsers"), null); }; export function transformFileSync(): never { throw new Error("Transforming files is not supported in browsers"); } export function transformFileAsync() { return Promise.reject( new Error("Transforming files is not supported in browsers"), ); }
